Airbox Repair ModeStep 1/6

Air Filter Housing

Passenger side intake airbox
Alex Verified ✓
1/5Difficulty
5–10Minutes
T25Torx
Purpose: Filters incoming air before it reaches the MAF sensor, intake tube, throttle body, and upper intake. This is the first polished MY BUICK template.
Alex’s verified notes:
  • Airbox screws are T25 Torx, not Phillips/8mm.
  • Airbox is on the passenger side.
  • Disconnect the MAF connector before lifting the lid far.
  • Lift the rear of the lid first and watch the locating tabs.
  • Vacuum leaves/debris from the lower box while it’s open.
While you’re here:
  • Check filter seal and pleats.
  • Inspect intake tube for cracks.
  • Check MAF connector lock tab.
  • Make sure lower airbox grommets are seated.
Relationships:
  • Contains: Air filter, MAF sensor area.
  • Connected to: Intake tube.
  • Blocks access to: Throttle body area.
  • Layer: Intake system layer 1.
✅

Airbox Complete

You finished the Airbox Gold Standard flow.

Next: MAF, intake tube, and throttle body get this same system.
